title: Cedar Palmas Room
prompt: Create an original flamenco-pop acoustic track at 98 BPM in F major. Groove: handclap-driven acoustic groove with palmas-like accents, foot taps, and restrained cajon; low end: a tight acoustic bass that follows the guitar rasgueado rhythm. Feature nylon guitar, percussive strums, handclaps, soft strings, and subtle piano, using sparse fills, human timing, and newly composed motifs. Vocal: passionate, clean, and controlled, with expressive phrasing but no excessive runs; provide no lyrics, only performance direction and melodic shape. Structure: short motif intro, light-percussion verse, passing-bass pre-chorus, emotional harmony chorus, clapless low-tension breakdown, opening-motif fade. Mix with dry vocals, warm lows, controlled highs, natural room tone, and a polished but not glossy master, keeping regional color in instrumentation and rhythm rather than melody quotation.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, direct folk tune copying, anthem quotes, hymn copying, EDM drop, trap hi-hats, fake crowd chants, muddy guitars
